architecture.description: Every component referenced in architecture must exist in provided context or be tagged [SPEC]
Every component interface must have defined input and output types
Dependency graphs must be validated for cycles. Cycles must be explicitly flagged.
Every constraint must trace to a source document or be tagged [GEN]

design_patterns.description: Referenced design patterns must be established patterns or tagged [SPEC] if novel
Pattern recommendations must include explicit fitness criteria evaluation

requirements.description: Requirement IDs must follow pattern REQ-NNNN
Every decomposed requirement must have at least one acceptance criterion

general.description: Every factual assertion must have a claim tag
[SPEC] claims must never be presented as [OBS] or [DRV]
Complex state must be in tables or diagrams, not prose paragraphs

known_drift_patterns.description: May propose unnecessarily complex architectures when simpler solutions exist
known_drift_patterns.mitigation: Require explicit complexity justification. Compare against simpler alternatives.

known_drift_patterns.description: Favors well-known patterns over potentially better-fit novel approaches
known_drift_patterns.mitigation: Require at least one unconventional option in tradeoff analysis.

audhd_considerations.context_window_usage: Excellent for full system architecture. Keep scope explicit.
audhd_considerations.externalization_support: Generates structured ADRs and dependency tables well.
audhd_considerations.monotropism_alignment: One subsystem at a time. Explicit scope boundaries.

known_drift_patterns.description: May miss cross-cutting concerns in fast mode
known_drift_patterns.mitigation: Flag if analysis scope exceeds single component. Escalate to G-PRO31.

known_drift_patterns.description: May propose architectures that sound elegant but violate stated constraints
known_drift_patterns.mitigation: Run constraint satisfaction check on all creative proposals.

known_drift_patterns.description: May favor novel approaches over proven solutions without sufficient justification
known_drift_patterns.mitigation: Require feasibility score and risk assessment alongside novel proposals.

audhd_considerations.context_window_usage: Good for bounded ideation. Keep constraints tight.
audhd_considerations.monotropism_alignment: Divergent phase only. Switch to convergent model after.

known_drift_patterns.description: May over-decompose plans into unnecessarily fine-grained steps
known_drift_patterns.mitigation: Set explicit decomposition depth limit. Stop at implementable unit.

known_drift_patterns.description: May verify claims that match expected engineering patterns without deep check
known_drift_patterns.mitigation: Never sole verifier for architecture decisions. Cross-validate.

error_handling.on_hallucination_detected: Tag as [SPEC], flag to operator, do not present as fact
error_handling.on_energy_crash: Route to nano model, JSON-only, binary output, escalate immediately
